query:
SELECT 
  SUM(sms_campaign_sent = 1) as sent,
  SUM(sms_campaign_sent = 0 OR sms_campaign_sent IS NULL) as remaining,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM customers 
WHERE last_visit_date >= '2025-01-01';
